intro: Over the past two weeks, from April 12 to April 25, 2026, ZCyberNews has published 37 articles under the Microsoft tag, covering a severity mix of 5 critical, 18 high, 10 medium, 3 informational, and 1 low. The threat actor Storm-2755 was observed in these reports. Key vulnerabilities include CVE-2026-40372 (CVSS 9.1), CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-34054 (CVSS 7.8), CVE-2026-26179 (CVSS 7.5), and CVE-2026-32183 (CVSS 7.5). Affected sectors span multiple, enterprise, cross-sector, education, and federal government, with impacts reported globally and in Canada and Japan.
